query:
ALTER TABLE treasury_transactions 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS blockchain_hash VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS source_type VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS destination_type VARCHAR(100);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute ALTER TABLE treasury_transactions 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS blockchain_hash VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS source_type VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS destination_type VARCHAR(100);
